title: Eid-ul-Fitr 2026: 50 AI prompts to create your viral festive look via Gemini- Check step-by-step guide
snippet: Eid-ul-Fitr 2026 is around the corner, and if you are looking to create your own festive look using Gemini AI, here are 50 prompts you can try.

title: ‘Phase of refocus’: OpenAI to merge ChatGPT, Codex, and Atlas into a unified desktop ‘superapp’
snippet: OpenAI is merging its AI web browser, ChatGPT, and Codex into a desktop super app. CEO Fidji Simo emphasized focusing on new successful projects while avoiding distractions, as she prepares to oversee the product revamp and enhance AI capabilities for users.

title: OnePlus Nord Buds 4 Pro with 55dB ANC, up to 54-hour battery launched in India at  ₹3,999
snippet: OnePlus has launched the Nord Buds 4 Pro in India at a price of  ₹3,999. The buds come with active noise cancellation, 12mm dynamic drivers, and Bluetooth 6.0. They will be available to buy from March 23 in Radiant Gray and Raven Black colour variants

title: ‘Google will win the AI race’: Elon Musk makes rare admission, claims Grok will win in space
snippet: Elon Musk acknowledges that Google will win the AI race in the US, while China will dominate globally and SpaceX will lead in space. His comments follow a discussion on the limitations of Google's Gemini 3.0 AI model.

title: Realme P4 Lite 5G with 6.8-inch 144Hz display and 7,000mAh battery launched in India, price starts at  ₹12,999
snippet: Realme has launched the P4 Lite 5G, featuring a 7,000mAh battery, 144Hz display, and a 13MP rear camera. Priced starting at  ₹12,999, it offers military-grade durability and a 6nm MediaTek processor. Sales begin on March 25 via Flipkart and other outlets.&nbsp;

title: Meta shuts down Horizon Worlds in VR to focus on a mobile-only app: here's what you need to know
snippet: Meta is shutting down the virtual reality version of Horizon Worlds, transitioning it to a mobile-only experience. The VR platform will be removed from the Quest store by March 31, with app removal from VR by June 15, 2026.

title: 'iPhone is not going away': Tim Cook shuts down rumors of AI hardware replacing Apple's flagship
snippet: Apple CEO Tim Cook assured that the iPhone will remain central to the company's strategy despite advancements in AI and augmented reality. Cook also talked about what the next 50 years of Apple could look like.

title: Mystery AI model revealed to be Xiaomis following suspicions it was DeepSeek V4

title: Update your iPhone now: Apple warns users as Google uncovers Russian-linked ‘DarkSword’ spyware threat
snippet: Apple has urged iPhone users to update their devices after a report revealed Russian-linked actors exploiting vulnerabilities in older iOS versions. The DarkSword exploit allows complete control over affected devices.

title: Meta AI agent goes rogue, leaks sensitive company and user data in major internal security breach: Report
snippet: A rogue Meta AI agent exposed certain data to unauthorized employees after responding to a technical query without permission, as per a latest report. The incident is said to have lasted two hours and was classified as 'Sev 1' severity by the company.

title: AI startup Yotta seeks $4 billion valuation ahead of planned IPO
snippet: The Mumbai-based company is aiming to secure roughly $500 million to $600 million in capital and then file its formal listing documents within weeks, according to people familiar with the matter. It plans to raise a similar amount in the public offering.
